description: An elite AI with aggressive Locust (boom bot) rushes and Unit Cannon planetary bombardment! Based on Queller AI with: Custom AI nukes (5000 metal), 50+ anti-nukes, 4 Locust suicide swarm types (5-80 bots), 15 Unit Cannons per planet, Dox/Bomber/Gunship harassment raids, and Paragon endgame. Features constant cross-planetary pressure with suicide bot avalanches. Requires Second Wave Units and Paragon mods.
author: Brandon (based on Queller AI by Quitch)
